message:
fix(actor,channel,gen_server): minor refinements to actor model and oneshot channel

- actor.rs: minor correction to actor lifecycle handling
- channel/oneshot.rs: extend oneshot with additional state tracking (+13 lines),
  improving robustness of single-use channel completion detection
- gen_server.rs: align gen_server callback signatures and error propagation
  patterns with updated actor model conventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
